AI searches email by meaning, not just keywords

Keyword search is brittle when teams remember the situation but not the subject line.

Where it removes work

  • Faster retrieval of old decisions
  • Better context before customer or partner replies
  • Less manual digging through inboxes

What Sysmatic would build

  • Index approved mailboxes safely
  • Embed message content and metadata
  • Return source-linked matches with privacy boundaries
